steps.title: Read the coefficients
steps.content: In $70T+85C=1{,}240$, $70T$ represents the points from triangle tokens, so each triangle token is worth $70$ points. Similarly, $85C$ shows each circle token is worth $85$ points.

steps.title: Find the difference
steps.content: A circle token is worth $85-70=15$ more points than a triangle token.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The difference is $15$, which matches choice D.
